TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ｍami, title = Ｍami, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ｍami} }

S.FORM: alang Mami ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 99 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 86 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay 'zil na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga llyung, tay mkraya' na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga Batul. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mami ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 99 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 86 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay 'zil na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga llyung, tay mkraya' na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga Batul. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mami ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mami ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ, taj ʔzil na mami ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ, taj mkjaħuʔ na mami ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ, taj mkrajaʔ na mami ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mami ħjaʔ ɣa βatul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
